context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: Our memory_limiter processor is firing constantly. The collector's own process.runtime.go.mem.heap_alloc shows 49 MiB bu

checklist.name: explains-that-the-49-mib-go-heap-vs-464-mib-c
checklist.description: Explains that the 49 MiB Go heap vs 464 MiB container RSS gap is kernel page cache (from hostPath /var/log/pods mounts counted toward the container's cgroup memory), NOT a Go memory leak. Says clearly this is not a leak and walks through how to confirm via the collector's own `process.runtime.go.mem.*` self-telemetry.
